blur_detection.description: The text and edges show moderate blur, likely due to camera movement or focus issues.
blur_detection.recommendation: Retake the image ensuring the camera is steady and the document is in focus.

contrast_assessment.description: The contrast between text and background is adequate but could be improved for better readability.
contrast_assessment.recommendation: Ensure even lighting and avoid shadows when capturing the image.

glare_identification.description: Minor glare is present in the top-right corner, slightly affecting readability.
glare_identification.recommendation: Adjust the angle of the camera to minimize reflections.

water_stains.description: No water stains are detected on the document.

tears_or_folds.description: The document shows no visible tears or folds.

cut_off_detection.description: A small portion of the bottom edge is slightly cut off.
cut_off_detection.recommendation: Ensure the entire document is within the frame when capturing the image.

missing_sections.description: No sections of the document are missing.

obstructions.description: There are no obstructions blocking the document content.

classification.error_type: File location is not same as project's location
classification.error_message: The document location (Thailand) does not match the expected location (China).
classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including supplier, consumer, transaction amount, transaction date, and item description. It is classified as a flight expense due to the presence of flight details and costs associated with the flight.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 6 out of 8 required fields, including supplier, consumer, transaction amount, transaction date, invoice/receipt number, and item description. This meets the criteria for being classified as an expense document.

extraction.special_notes: This receipt is NOT a tax invoice. Please refer to https://taximoice.airia.c for your tax invoice. This purchase is subject to AirAsia's General Terms & Conditions of Carriage and payment signifies acknowledgment and acceptance of such terms and conditions by all passengers named herein.
extraction.terms_conditions: This purchase is subject to AirAsia's General Terms & Conditions of Carriage and payment signifies acknowledgment and acceptance of such terms and conditions by all passengers named herein.
